slides.title: Designing with Intention
slides.subtitle: Lessons from a Decade of Product Design

slides.text: Good design is obvious. Great design is transparent. The best work disappears into the experience it creates.

slides.title: Less, But Better
slides.subtitle: Why reduction is the hardest design skill to master.

items.title: Beauty vs Clarity
items.desc: Aesthetics should amplify comprehension, never compete with it

items.title: Delight vs Speed
items.desc: Micro-interactions matter, but not at the cost of task completion

items.title: Consistency vs Context
items.desc: Systems enable speed; breaking them enables meaning

points: Reduced steps from 7 to 3 with progressive disclosure
